name: Plan Preparation with Physical Feature Survey and Plan Report, Data base management, Mouza schedule (mouza plot No) Book; Package-5 (Extended)- Magura Sadar Upazila, District- Magura.
description: The assignment covers preparatory planning, web-based field data collection, mouza map digitization and georeferencing, RTK-based benchmark identification and BM pillar installation. It also includes GPS and DGPS surveys for important locations, spot heights and topographic features, together with physical infrastructure, topographic, land use, drainage, environmental, traffic volume and socio-economic surveys. The collected data are integrated into MIS and GIS databases in ArcGIS and published through a web-based data server.
objective: To prepare a complete planning and survey database for Magura Sadar Upazila; to integrate physical feature survey, topographic data, land use information and mouza schedule outputs; to support plan preparation through reliable GIS mapping, database management and web-based spatial data publication.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey; Use of Web based platform for field survey data collection; Physical Feature Survey; Topographic Survey; Land Use Survey; Geo-referencing the maps; Projection of Maps; Finalization and Printing of Maps; Preparation of Plan (Sub-Regional Plan along with thematic map, Structure Plan, Urban and Rural Area plan); Publishing the project database to Web based data server.

name: Preparation of UAV Based Physical Feature, Topographic & Landuse GIS Database, Mouza Map Collection, Scanning, Digitization, Editing & Printing. Under Preparation of Development Plan for Meherpur Zilla Project.
description: The project involves UAV-based physical feature, topographic and land use GIS database development for the Meherpur Zilla Development Plan. The work includes web-based field data collection, mouza map digitization and georeferencing, RTK-based benchmark identification, BM pillar installation, GPS and DGPS survey, physical infrastructure survey, land use survey, drainage and environmental survey, traffic volume survey and socio-economic data integration. All field and spatial datasets are organized within MIS and GIS databases in ArcGIS and prepared for publication through a web-based data server.
objective: To develop a UAV-based GIS database for the Meherpur Zilla Development Plan; to collect, scan, digitize, georeference and edit mouza maps and land use information; to produce accurate physical feature, topographic and land use outputs for planning and decision-making.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey; Use of Web based platform for field survey data collection; Physical Feature Survey; Topographic Survey; Land Use Survey; Geo-referencing the maps; Projection of Maps; Finalization and Printing of Maps; Preparation of Plan (Sub-Regional Plan along with thematic map, Structure Plan, Urban and Rural Area plan); Publishing the project database to Web based data server.

name: Preparation of Development Plan for Mirshrai Upazila, Chittagong District: Risk Sensitive land use Plan.
description: The assignment supports preparation of the risk-sensitive development plan for Mirshrai Upazila through systematic spatial data preparation and field survey. responsibility: Use of Web based platform for field survey data collection; Physical Feature Survey; Topographic Survey; Land Use Survey; Geo-referencing the maps; Projection of Maps; Finalization and Printing of Maps; Preparation of Plan (Sub-Regional Plan along with thematic map, Structure Plan, Urban and Rural Area plan); Publishing the project database to Web based data server.

name: Mymensingh Strategic Development Plan 2011-2031 (MUDP) (Rural & Urban) with Physical Feature Survey work with RTK GPS, Total Station & using 3D image with Relevant Supporting other Survey.
description: The project provided spatial and survey support for the Mymensingh Strategic Development Plan through stereo image collection, image processing, database preparation and mouza map digitization. The outputs were integrated into MIS and GIS databases in ArcGIS, used for GIS base map preparation and published through a web-based data server.

description: The project involved collecting GIS and attribute data for the IMIS of Jashore and Benapole Paurashava following standard data quality management procedures. The work strengthened the spatial database for urban sanitation and municipal service planning through structured field data collection and validation.

responsibility: Site Map preparation; Detail design preparation; Land development schedule; Plot schedule; Orthophoto preparation; DEM preparation.; Contour Map preparation.; Topographic Map preparation.

The work included web-based field data collection, RTK-based BM identification, GCP collection, aerial image acquisition and image processing for 3D vector extraction, DTM data generation and DEM preparation. The project also produced high-resolution orthophoto mosaics, 3D vector data with Z values and a physical feature database.
objective: To supply drone-captured 3D imagery and geodatabase outputs for Magura Sadar, Mohammadpur and Shalikha Upazilas; to conduct aerial image collection, RTK-based GCP survey and photogrammetric image processing; to generate orthophotos, DEM, DTM, 3D vector data and physical feature databases.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey; Aerial Image Collection; Performing field surveys with RTK for BM location identification, GCP Collection; Image Processing For extracting 3D vector and DTM data, DEM generation; High Resolution Orthophoto mosaic generation; 3D Vector Data generation with Z values; Physical Feature Database Preparation.
location: Magura Sadar, Mohammadpur and Shalikha Upazila, Magura

name: Supplying of Drone capturing 3D image and Geo database for Package-2, Bakshiganj and Dewanganj Upazila, Dist. Jamalpur under 9UpzCp project, UDD.
description: The assignment involved drone image capture and geodatabase preparation for Bakshiganj and Dewanganj Upazila under the 9UpzCP project. The final outputs included high-resolution orthophoto mosaics, 3D vector data with Z values and a physical feature database.

name: Topographical Survey of Roads, Drain, Pipeline and Tubewell for Gazipur City Corporation under CGP, LGED
description: The project covered topographic survey of roads, drains, water pipelines, tube wells and related infrastructure in Gazipur City Corporation under the City Governance Project. The work included benchmark establishment, bridge and culvert survey, cross-section survey, longitudinal section survey and drafting of survey drawings. The outputs included road profiles, pipeline and drainage survey data, earthwork quantity information, TBM lists with XYZ values and final reporting.
objective: To conduct topographical surveys of roads, drains, water pipelines, tubewells and related urban infrastructure in Gazipur City Corporation; to prepare longitudinal profiles, cross-sections, bridge and culvert details and TBM lists; to support infrastructure planning through quantity assessment and final survey reporting.
responsibility: Longitudinal Profile and Plan of Roads; Pipeline and drainage survey.; Cross section survey with quantity determination of earth work.; Plan and detail of Bridge, Culvert, Tubewell etc.; TBM list with XYZ value; Final report submission.

name: Feasibility Study for Dhaka-Mymensingh Expressway (DME) PPP Project
description: The assignment supported the feasibility study for the Dhaka-Mymensingh Expressway PPP Project through aerial survey and spatial data preparation. The work included DSM and DEM generation, contour preparation, 3D physical feature digitization, RTK-based BM identification, BM pillar installation, GPS and DGPS survey, spot height collection, physical infrastructure survey and topographic survey. The outputs supported route analysis, feasibility assessment and project documentation.
objective: To support the Dhaka-Mymensingh Expressway PPP feasibility study with spatial and survey evidence; to conduct aerial, topographic, hydrographic and physical feature surveys; to prepare DEM, DSM, contour, georeferenced maps and final survey documentation for expressway planning.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey; Aerial Survey, DEM, DSM; Topographic Survey; Hydrographic Survey; Aerial Survey and Videography (Drone Survey); Geo-referencing the maps; Projection of Maps; Finalization and Printing of Maps.

name: Landscaping, Beautification, Architectural Design and 3D Animation of DND Lake in Narayanganj City Corporation
description: The project combined spatial survey, architectural design, landscaping and visualization for the DND Lake area in Narayanganj City Corporation. Activities included mouza map digitization and georeferencing, RTK-based BM identification, BM pillar installation, GPS and DGPS survey, spot height collection, physical infrastructure survey, topographic survey, land use survey, drainage and environmental survey, traffic volume survey and socio-economic survey. The work also included GIS database integration, base map preparation, architectural design, landscape planning, 3D animation and master plan preparation.
objective: To prepare landscaping, beautification, architectural design and 3D animation outputs for DND Lake in Narayanganj City Corporation; to collect physical feature, topographic, land use and socio-economic information; to support urban design, master planning and visual presentation through GIS base maps and 3D visualization.
responsibility: Physical Feature Survey; Topographic Survey; Land Use Survey; Socio-Economic Survey; GIS Base Map.

name: Asian Duplex Town Master Plan
description: The assignment supported preparation of the Asian Duplex Town Master Plan through mouza map digitization, georeferencing and field-based spatial surveys. The work included RTK-based BM identification, BM pillar installation, GPS and DGPS survey, spot height collection, traffic volume survey and socio-economic survey. The collected data were integrated into MIS and GIS databases in ArcGIS to support physical feature mapping, transport analysis and master plan preparation.
objective: To prepare the Asian Duplex Town Master Plan with a survey-based planning foundation; to conduct physical feature, topographic and transport surveys; to support land development planning through georeferenced maps, projected GIS layers and spatial analysis outputs.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey; Physical Feature Survey; Topographic Survey; Transport Survey; Geo-referencing the maps; Projection of Maps.

name: Preparation of Master Plan for Green Land Town, Purbachal, Dhaka, Bangladesh
description: The project supported preparation of the Green Land Town Master Plan at Purbachal through spatial survey, planning analysis and infrastructure layout preparation. Activities included mouza map digitization and georeferencing, RTK-based BM identification, BM pillar installation, DGPS survey, Total Station survey, spot height collection, physical infrastructure survey, topographic survey, land use survey, drainage and environmental survey, traffic volume survey and socio-economic survey. The outputs included site plan, land use plan, contour map, 3D layout, sectoral and neighborhood plans, road network plan, traffic circulation plan, drainage master plan and utility service plans.
objective: To prepare the Green Land Town Master Plan in Purbachal; to conduct physical feature, topographic, land use and socio-economic surveys; to produce site plans, contour maps, road network plans, drainage plans and utility service plans for planned residential development.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey, Physical Feature Survey, Topographic Survey, Land Use Survey, Socio-Economic Survey, Geo-referencing the maps, Projection of Maps, Finalization and Printing of Maps.

name: Preparation of Master Plan of Neelachol Housing, Purbachol, Dhaka, Bangladesh.
description: The assignment supported preparation of the Neelachol Housing Master Plan at Purbachal through mouza map digitization, georeferencing and field survey. Activities included RTK-based BM identification, BM pillar installation, DGPS survey, Total Station survey, spot height collection, physical infrastructure survey, topographic survey, land use survey, drainage and environmental survey, traffic volume survey and socio-economic survey. The outputs included site plan, land use plan, contour map, 3D layout, sectoral and neighborhood plans, road network plan, traffic circulation plan, drainage master plan and utility service plans.
objective: To prepare the Neelachol Housing Master Plan in Purbachal; to conduct physical feature, topographic, land use and socio-economic surveys; to produce site plans, contour maps, road network plans, drainage plans and utility service plans for planned housing development.
responsibility: Work Volume Assessment and reconnaissance survey, Work plan of field survey, Physical Feature Survey, Topographic Survey, Land Use Survey, Socio-Economic Survey, Geo-referencing the maps, Projection of Maps, Finalization and Printing of Maps.

name: Preparation of Master Plan of Asian Town, Purbachal, Dhaka, Bangladesh.
description: The project supported preparation of the Asian Town Master Plan at Purbachal through cadastral and topographic data preparation. The work included mouza map digitization, georeferencing, Total Station survey, spot height collection, physical infrastructure survey, topographic survey, land use survey, drainage survey and environmental survey. The outputs included site plan, land use plan, contour map, 3D layout, sectoral and neighborhood plans, road network plan, traffic circulation plan, drainage master plan, utility service plan and water supply and sewerage system plan.
objective: To prepare the Asian Town Master Plan in Purbachal; to conduct topographic, physical infrastructure, land use and drainage-related surveys; to produce site plans, contour maps, road network plans, traffic circulation plans and utility service plans for planned urban development.
responsibility: Site Plan, Land use plan; Contour Map including 3D layout Plan; Sectoral/Block/Zonal/ Neighbourhood Plan; Road network Plan, Traffic Circular Plan.; Drainage Master Plan; Utility Service Plan; Water Supply and Sewerage System Plan etc.

name: Topographical Survey of Upazila Road, Bridge, Growth Center Market, Ghat and Rural Waterways and Preparation of Land Acquisition Plan for Rural Transport Improvement Projects (RTIP-II)
description: The assignment involved topographic survey of upazila roads, union roads, bridges, growth centre markets, ghats and rural waterways under RTIP-II. Activities included benchmark establishment, cross-section survey, longitudinal section survey, drafting of survey drawings, mouza map collection and digitization and preparation of land acquisition plan layouts. The outputs included cross sections, long sections, physical feature survey within road boundary land, land acquisition plans, land schedules, profile sheets and BM lists.
objective: To support rural transport infrastructure development under RTIP-II; to conduct topographical surveys of upazila roads, bridges, growth centre markets, ghats and rural waterways; to prepare land acquisition plans, land schedules, profiles, cross-sections and BM lists for project implementation.
responsibility: Total station Survey, GPS Survey, Leveling Survey; Preparation of Cross section, Long section and; Physical feature survey within the road boundary land. preparation of land acquisition plan and land schedule., Profile Sheet.; B. M. List submission with report.

name: Preparation and Supply of 45 Minutes 3D-Visualization and Animation along with Presentation Product on Action Area Plan of Block-A (Consist of 5 Wards) at Narayanganj City Corporation.
description: The project involved preparation and supply of a 45-minute 3D visualization and animation package for the Action Area Plan of Block-A at Narayanganj City Corporation. The work included photo and video capture, 3D project preparation and development of a presentation product to communicate the proposed action area plan. The output supported visual interpretation, stakeholder presentation and planning communication.
objective: To prepare and supply a 45-minute 3D visualization, animation and presentation product for the Action Area Plan of Block-A in Narayanganj City Corporation; to capture photo and video materials for visual documentation; to develop a 3D project model that supports planning communication and stakeholder presentation.
responsibility: Photo/Video capturing; 3D project preparation for visualization.

name: Repare Base Map Of Project Name
description: The project involves base map preparation for the assigned project area by compiling available spatial information, cleaning and organizing map layers and preparing a usable spatial framework for planning and mapping purposes. The work supports project-level mapping, spatial reference preparation and future GIS-based analysis.
objective: To prepare a base map for the assigned project; to compile, clean, organize and structure available spatial information; to support planning, mapping and future GIS database development through a usable base mapping output.
